---
id: disable-session
title: "Deactivate a Session"
description: "Calling this endpoint deactivates the specified session. Session data is not deleted."
sidebar_label: "Deactivate a Session"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Deactivate a Session"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/admin/sessions/{id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Calling this endpoint deactivates the specified session. Session data is not deleted.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
